_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: we compared the KSR1 and Merlin protein interaction complexes (interactomes) by quantitative IP/MS in HEK293T cells...The proteomic analysis identified 156 interactors for Merlin and 224 interactors for KSR1
details: Used for quantitative IP/MS analysis to identify 224 interactors for KSR1 and 156 interactors for Merlin, with 32 overlapping proteins between the two interactomes
